steps.title: Match the plural animals
steps.content: The blank refers back to "many even-toed ungulates," including multiple deer species. It must be plural and must function as the object of "prevent," not as a possessive form.

steps.title: Reject number and case errors
steps.content: Choice A is singular. Choice C is singular and possessive. Choice D is plural but possessive, so it cannot serve as the object in "prevent ___ from joining." The answer is B.
